title: The Wall Street Journal Names Trane Technologies One of the Best-Managed Companies of 2023
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, has been selected to The Wall Street Journal's list of the Best-Managed Companies for the third consecutive year. The ranking, developed by the Drucker Institute, measures corporate effectiveness, based upon five principles: customer satisfaction, employee engagement and development, innovation, social responsibility and financial strength. “At Trane Technologies, we believe that bold ambition drives act.

title: Trane Technologies Named to S&P Dow Jones Sustainability World and North American Indices
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, has been named to the S&P Dow Jones Sustainability World Index for the third consecutive year and the North America Index for the thirteenth consecutive year. The company performed in the 98th percentile in the Building Products industry in the S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment (CSA score as of Nov. 27, 2023), with a perfect score of 100 in the Resource Efficiency and Circularity cat.

title: Riaz Raihan Joins Trane Technologies as Chief Digital Officer
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, announced the appointment of Riaz Raihan as Chief Digital Officer, effective December 11. Raihan will report to Chair and CEO Dave Regnery as part of the executive leadership team and will lead the digital strategy for Trane Technologies globally. “The appointment of Riaz as Chief Digital Officer is an exciting milestone for Trane Technologies as we continue to broaden our digital services and solutions.

title: Good Housekeeping 2023 Home Renovation Awards Recognizes Innovative Heat Pump from Trane Technologies
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, is pleased to announce the Trane® XV20i Variable Speed Heat Pump with Trane Link has been named the best High-Efficiency Heat Pump in Good Housekeeping's 2023 Home Renovation Awards. The annual award recognizes the top products and services in home improvement.
